reminders.notes:
Open Settings.
2. Tap Screen Time.
3. Select my name.
4. Tap Manage Screen Time.
5. Tap Change Screen Time Passcode.
6. Enter your iPhone passcode.
7. Enter and confirm the new Screen Time passcode.

I think you can also choose a recovery method if you forgot but you can choose your email I believe. 

If you have time please may you save the code on a password manager?

This should make it impossible for me to try and change any settings.
